task: go towards the yellow block and grasp it
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white cabinet with an open door is visible, containing a red block and a yellow block. A white tray is on the floor. The cabinet door is ajar, and the blocks are inside the cabinet. STRATEGY - First, reach into the cabinet to locate the yellow block. Then, grasp it. Finally, transport it to the white tray on the floor. Failure modes include misreaching for the wrong block or dropping the block during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach into the cabinet to find the yellow block; Step 2 grasp the yellow block by its body; Step 3 transport it to the tray; Step 4 place it on the tray.
Goal: on(yellow_block, white_tray)
Scene: white_cabinet, red_block, yellow_block, white_tray
Step 1: reach(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block inside the white_cabinet
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: inside(gripper, white_cabinet) [progress]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: inside(gripper, white_cabinet)
Step 2: grasp(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: holding(yellow_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_block)
Step 3: transport(yellow_block -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white_tray
  spatial: above(yellow_block, white_tray, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_block)
  done_when: above(yellow_block, white_tray, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_block -> white_tray)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the white_tray
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_block, white_tray) [completion]; released(yellow_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_block, white_tray) AND released(yellow_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow block inside the white_cabinet
the body of the yellow block
an empty area on the white_tray
an empty area on the white_tray
